title: heptapleurum matsallehii
intro: Heptapleurum matsallehii, also known as the 'Titi Plant', is a species of flowering plant in the family Araliaceae. It is traditionally used in medicine, particularly in Malaysian folk medicine, for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, as well as its ability to treat various health issues. The plant is believed to have health benefits such as reducing fever, relieving pain, and treating digestive problems, among others. Heptapleurum matsallehii is often used in herbal preparations, including infusions, decoctions, and topical applications, to leverage its medicinal properties.
